<p>UDP服务器代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">UDPServer.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM) #创建服务器套接字
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.bind((&#39;&#39;, serverPort)) #给套接字绑定端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;The server is ready to receive.&#39;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">while True: #服务器要一直在线等待，所以给一个死循环
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> message, clientAddress = serverSocket.recvfrom(2048) #从服务器套接字中读取信息（发送的消息和客户机IP地址+端口号）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> modifiedMessage = message.decode().upper() #对消息进行处理（此处是改大写）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> serverSocket.sendto(modifiedMessage.encode(), clientAddress) #将处理后的消息发回给客户机</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>UDP客户机代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">UDPClient.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverName = gethostname() #由于没得服务器，服务器主机用本机来当
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM) #创建客户机套接字
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">message = input(&#39;Input lowercase sentence:&#39;) #得到输入字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.sendto(message.encode(),(serverName, serverPort)) #发送数据到相应主机名+端口号的服务器进程
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">modifiedMessage, serverAddress = clientSocket.recvfrom(2048) #接收服务器发回的消息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(modifiedMessage.decode()) #显示接收的字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.close() #关闭客户机socket</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p> 先运行UDPServer.ipynb，启动服务器运行。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png" alt="UDP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p> 先运行UDPClient.ipynb，进行客户机访问。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png" alt="UDP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="tcp中的socket编程" class="heading-element"><span>TCP中的socket编程</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>服务器的先行准备</p>
<ul>
<li>服务器必须先运行</li>
<li>服务器需要创建socket来连接客户机</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>客户机连接服务器</p>
<ul>
<li>客户机需要创建自己的socket，明确服务器进程的IP地址和端口号</li>
<li>客户机创建socket时，客户机和服务器之间需建立TCP连接</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>服务器接收客户机消息</p>
<ul>
<li>服务器需创建一个新的socket，为了服务器进程能够和客户机进行通信
<ul>
<li>要运行服务器与多个客户机进行通信</li>
<li>用源的端口号来区分不同的客户机</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p> TCP提供的是一种可靠的字节流（byte-stream）传输（pipe）。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="tcp中的socket编程示例" class="heading-element"><span>TCP中的socket编程示例</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b%e7%a4%ba%e4%be%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>TCP服务器代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">TCPServer.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM) #创建服务器套接字（前台）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.bind((&#39;&#39;, serverPort)) #给套接字绑定端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.listen(1)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;The server is ready to receive.&#39;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">while True: #服务器要一直在线等待，所以给一个死循环
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket, addr = serverSocket.accept() #前台套接字接收到请求后，创建一个新的套接字（窗口）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> sentence = connectionSocket.recv(1024).decode() #窗口套接字读取信息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> capitalizedSentence = sentence.upper() #对消息进行处理（此处是改大写）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket.send(capitalizedSentence.encode()) #将处理后的信息发回给客户机
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket.close() #关闭窗口套接字，前台套接字保持开放</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>TCP客户机代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">TCPClient.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverName = gethostname() #由于没得服务器，服务器主机用本机来当
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM) #创建客户机套接字(类型为字节流SOCK_STREAM)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.connect((serverName, serverPort)) #TCP连接
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sentence = input(&#39;Input lowercase sentence:&#39;) #得到输入字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.send(sentence.encode()) #发送数据到服务器
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">modifiedSentence = clientSocket.recv(1024) #接收服务器发回的消息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;From server:&#39;, modifiedSentence.decode()) #显示接收的字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.close() #关闭客户机socket</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p> 先运行TCPServer.ipynb，启动服务器运行。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p> 先运行TCPClient.ipynb，进行客户机访问。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h1 id="传输层transport-layer" class="heading-element"><span>传输层（Transport Layer）</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82transport-layer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h2 id="传输层服务" class="heading-element"><span>传输层服务</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="传输层概述" class="heading-element"><span>传输层概述</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>为不同主机之间的应用进程提供通信的桥梁</li>
<li>端对端：传输层协议在端系统间运行，不需要涉及网络核心
<ul>
<li>发送方把应用层接到的消息分成段（segment），再把这些段传输给网络层</li>
<li>接收方把接收到的段重新拼装成消息，传输给应用层</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>传输层的协议：TCP和UDP</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>传输层和网络层对比</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>网络层：主机之间的通信</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>传输层：进程之间的通信</p>
<p>传输层依赖于并能强化网络层服务。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="传输层协议" class="heading-element"><span>传输层协议</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>TCP：可靠的，有序的传送</p>
<ul>
<li>拥塞控制</li>
<li>流量控制</li>
<li>需要建立连接</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>UDP：不可靠的，无序的传送</p>
<ul>
<li>提供尽力而为交付服务</li>
</ul>
<p>二者均不提供的服务：延时保障、带宽保障</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="多路复用multiplexing与多路分用demultiplexing" class="heading-element"><span>多路复用（Multiplexing）与多路分用（Demultiplexing）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8multiplexing%e4%b8%8e%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8demultiplexing" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 多路复用存在于发送方：发送方需要处理多个套接字，并且给套接字加上传输层的头部。</p>
<p> 多路分用存在于接收方：利用头部信息，将接收到的报文段传输给正确的套接字。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png" alt="Multiplexing/demultiplexing.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Multiplexing/demultiplexing.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="多路分用" class="heading-element"><span>多路分用</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="多路分用工作流程" class="heading-element"><span>多路分用工作流程</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p>主机收到IP数据报（IP datagram）</p>
<ul>
<li>每个数据报有源IP地址和目的IP地址</li>
<li>每个数据报携带一个传输层报文段（segment）</li>
<li>每个报文段有源和目的的端口号</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>主机利用IP地址和端口号来把报文段传入正确的套接字</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png" alt="segment format.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=large 2x" data-title="segment format.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="无连接的多路分用connectionless-demultiplexing" class="heading-element"><span>无连接的多路分用（Connectionless demultiplexing）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%97%a0%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%9a%84%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8connectionless-demultiplexing" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 参考<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#UDP%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">UDP的socket工作方式</a>，如果数据报的<strong>目的IP地址和端口号</strong>相同，它们将被传到同一个socket当中。（即使数据报的源可能不同）</p>
<h4 id="面向连接的多路分用connection-oriented-demux" class="heading-element"><span>面向连接的多路分用（Connection-oriented demux）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%a2%e5%90%91%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%9a%84%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8connection-oriented-demux" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 参考<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#TCP%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">TCP的socket工作方式</a></p>
<ul>
<li>标记TCP的socket需要4元组：源IP地址、源端口号、目的IP地址、目的端口号</li>
<li>多路分用：接收方要用到上面4个值来传入不同的socket</li>
<li>服务器的主机可能要同时支持多个TCP连接</li>
<li>web服务器有不同的socket对应每个连接的客户机，其中非持久性HTTP会给每个请求都建立新的socket。</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="udp-1" class="heading-element"><span>UDP</span>
 <a href="#udp-1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="udp概述" class="heading-element"><span>UDP概述</span>
 <a href="#udp%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> UDP（User Datagram Protocol，用户数据报协议），标准为RFC 768。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>只有基本的功能</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>尽力而为的服务，UDP可能会丢包或者失序</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>不用连接：客户机和服务器不需要握手，每个UDP段都是独立处理的</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png" alt="UDP segment.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP segment.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>UDP的优点</p>
<ul>
<li>不需要进行连接，连接可能会造成时延</li>
<li>简单：不需要考虑连接的状态</li>
<li>相对小的头的大小</li>
<li>不需要拥塞控制，可以尽快地把UDP段发出去</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>UDP的应用</p>
<ul>
<li>流媒体的app（运行一部分数据的丢失，但是对速度很敏感）</li>
<li>DNS</li>
<li>SNMP</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>通过UDP进行可靠的传输（UDP本身是不可靠的）</p>
<ul>
<li>在应用层增加可靠性</li>
<li>app要有对应的错误恢复方法</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="udp校验和udp-checksum" class="heading-element"><span>UDP校验和（UDP checksum）</span>
 <a href="#udp%e6%a0%a1%e9%aa%8c%e5%92%8cudp-checksum" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 位于UDP头部，负责检测传输的段有没有发生“错误”（比如位的翻转）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>发送方：</p>
<ul>
<li>把发送的段的内容包括头部分，当作一组16-bit的整数</li>
<li>校验和：报文段中的所有16-bit的和的取关于“1”的补码</li>
<li>发送方要将校验和放到UDP的校验和部分</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>接收方：</p>
<ul>
<li>计算接收到的报文段的校验和</li>
<li>将接收方的校验和与发送方的校验和进行比较，不同则检测出错误，相同则没检测出错误</li>
</ul>
<p> 校验和相同只能说是“检验不出错误”，不能保障没有错误。比如传输中多个16bit字发生错误，但是可能恰巧相加校验和不变。</p>
<p>例题：有两个16-bit的字，1110011001100110 和 1101010101010101，求校验和。</p>
<p>+ ———————wrap around1sumchecksum11100110011001101101010101010101—————————1011101110111011101110111011110001000100010000111110011001100110+ 1101010101010101————————————————wrap around11011101110111011sum1011101110111100checksum0100010001000011</p>
<p> wraparound存在溢出，进位的部分回卷，加到最后一位。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="可靠数据传输原理" class="heading-element"><span>可靠数据传输原理</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%af%e9%9d%a0%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 可靠数据传输原理（Principles of reliable data transfer, <strong>rdt</strong>）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>对应用层、传输层、链路层都很重要</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_provide-service.png" alt="provide service.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_provide-service.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_provide-service.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_provide-service.png?size=large 2x" data-title="provide service.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/> <img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_service-implementation.png" alt="service implementation.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_service-implementation.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_service-implementation.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_service-implementation.png?size=large 2x" data-title="service implementation.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>不可靠信道的特点决定了不可靠传输协议的复杂度</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>调用接口函数：</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">接口函数</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">参数</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">作用</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left"><code>rdt_send()</code></td>
 <td style="text-align: left">data</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">调用数据传输协议的发送方，将要发送的数据交付给位于接收方的较高层</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left"><code>udt_send()</code></td>
 <td style="text-align: left">packet</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">rdt调用，通过不可靠信道，将packet传输到接收方</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left"><code>rdt_rcv()</code></td>
 <td style="text-align: left">packet</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">在packet到达接收方信道时调用</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left"><code>deliver_data()</code></td>
 <td style="text-align: left">data</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">rdt调用，传输数据到高层</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>与不可靠信道之间的函数调用都是双向的，由于其不可靠性，需要进行确认的控制信号（ACK，NAK）。</p>
<h3 id="rdt10经可靠信道的可靠数据传输" class="heading-element"><span>rdt1.0：经可靠信道的可靠数据传输</span>
 <a href="#rdt10%e7%bb%8f%e5%8f%af%e9%9d%a0%e4%bf%a1%e9%81%93%e7%9a%84%e5%8f%af%e9%9d%a0%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="rdt10概述" class="heading-element"><span>rdt1.0概述</span>
 <a href="#rdt10%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p>下层信道完全可靠：rdt1.0中假设下层的信道是一个完全可靠的信道（理想情况）</p>
<ul>
<li>没有bit的错误</li>
<li>没有分组（packet）丢失</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>发送方和接收方的</p>
<p>有限状态机（FSM）</p>
<p>（存在状态和操作）</p>
<ul>
<li>发送方发送数据给下层信道</li>
<li>接收方接收下层信道传来的数据</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="rdt10有限状态机" class="heading-element"><span>rdt1.0有限状态机</span>
 <a href="#rdt10%e6%9c%89%e9%99%90%e7%8a%b6%e6%80%81%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="发送方" class="heading-element"><span>发送方</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 发送方首先在“<strong>等待上级调用</strong>”的状态，<code>rdt_send(data)</code>上级调用rdt，从上级接收到data，<code>make_pkt(data)</code>将data装到packet里，再用<code>udt_send(packet)</code>将packet发送出去，完成后发送方再回到“等待上级调用”的状态。（发送方只有一个状态）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-sender.png" alt="rdt1.0 sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-sender.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-sender.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-sender.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt1.0 sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h5 id="接收方" class="heading-element"><span>接收方</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 接收方首先在“<strong>等待下级调用</strong>”的状态，<code>rdt_rcv(packet)</code>下级调用rdt，从下级接收到packet，用<code>extract(packet, data)</code>将packet重新恢复成data，提取出来的data再通过<code>deliver_data(data)</code>传送给上级。完成后接收方再回到“等待下级调用”的状态。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-receiver.png" alt="rdt1.0 receiver.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-receiver.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-receiver.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt1-0-receiver.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt1.0 receiver.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>下层信道不可能完全可靠 =&gt; 引入rdt2.0</p>
<h3 id="rdt20经具有比特差错信道的数据传输" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.0：经具有比特差错信道的数据传输</span>
 <a href="#rdt20%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%b7%e6%9c%89%e6%af%94%e7%89%b9%e5%b7%ae%e9%94%99%e4%bf%a1%e9%81%93%e7%9a%84%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 引入差错检测、控制信号和重传机制，解决下层信道不可靠问题。</p>
<h4 id="rdt20概述" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.0概述</span>
 <a href="#rdt20%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>packet在下层信道传输中会出现<strong>比特翻转</strong>：可以引入<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#UDP%e6%a0%a1%e9%aa%8c%e5%92%8c%ef%bc%88UDP-checksum%ef%bc%89"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><strong>校验和（checksum）</strong></a>来检测比特错误。</li>
<li>错误恢复——如果检验到错误如何恢复？
<ul>
<li><strong>ACKs（acknowledgements）</strong>：接收方告诉发送方收到的pkt是正确的</li>
<li><strong>NAKs（negative acknowledgements）</strong>：接收方告诉发送方收到的pkt是错误的</li>
<li>发送方收到NAK则重传那个pkt</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>rdt2.0引入的新机制
<ul>
<li>差错检测：checksum</li>
<li>接收方反馈：控制信号（control msg），即ACK和NAK</li>
<li>重传</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="rdt20无限状态机" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.0无限状态机</span>
 <a href="#rdt20%e6%97%a0%e9%99%90%e7%8a%b6%e6%80%81%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="发送方-1" class="heading-element"><span>发送方</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9-1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> rdt2.0的发送方有2个状态——<strong>等待上级调用</strong>、<strong>等待ACK或NAK</strong>。发送方最初处于“<strong>等待上级调用</strong>”的状态，<code>rdt_send(data)</code>上级调用rdt，从上级接收到data，<code>sndpkt = make_pkt(data, checksum)</code>将data装到packet里，再用<code>udt_send(sndpkt)</code>将packet发送出去。此时，发送方变为“<strong>等待ACK或NAK</strong>”的状态。<code>rdt_rcv(rcvpkt)</code>接收反馈，如果<code>isNAK(rcvpkt)</code>即接收到NAK，则重传<code>udt_send(sndpkt)</code>，并保持“<strong>等待ACK或NAK</strong>”的状态；如果<code>isACK(rcvpkt)</code>即接收到ACK，则回到“<strong>等待上级调用</strong>”的状态。</p>
<p>停等机制（stop and wait）</p>
<p> 发送方发送一个packet，然后等待接收方的响应。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-sender.png" alt="rdt2.0 sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-sender.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-sender.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-sender.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.0 sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h5 id="接收方-1" class="heading-element"><span>接收方</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9-1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 接收方还是只有一个状态——<strong>等待下级调用</strong>。接收方首先在“<strong>等待下级调用</strong>”的状态，<code>rdt_rcv(rcvpkt)</code>接收方接收packet，如果<code>corrupt(rcvpkt)</code>，即检测到错误，则<code>udt_send(NAK)</code>反馈NAK；如果<code>notcorrupt(rcvpkt)</code>，即未检测到错误，则<code>extract(packet, data)</code>将packet重新恢复成data，<code>deliver_data(data)</code>将data传送给上级，最后<code>udt_send(ACK)</code>反馈ACK。完成后接收方再回到“等待下级调用”的状态。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-receiver.png" alt="rdt2.0 receiver.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-receiver.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-receiver.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-0-receiver.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.0 receiver.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>接收方可能判断ACK/NAK信号出错，导致发送分组重复 =&gt; 引入rdt2.1</p>
<h3 id="rdt21接收方判断acknak信号出错" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.1：接收方判断ACK/NAK信号出错</span>
 <a href="#rdt21%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9%e5%88%a4%e6%96%adacknak%e4%bf%a1%e5%8f%b7%e5%87%ba%e9%94%99" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 引入0/1序号和丢弃分组，解决接收方判断ACK/NAK信号出错，导致发送分组重复问题。但这也让发送方和接收方有限状态机的状态翻倍。</p>
<h4 id="rdt21有限状态机" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.1有限状态机</span>
 <a href="#rdt21%e6%9c%89%e9%99%90%e7%8a%b6%e6%80%81%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="发送方-2" class="heading-element"><span>发送方</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9-2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 相较于rdt2.0，rdt2.1在发送的packet里包含了0/1序号（sequence number），所以发送方有4种状态——<strong>等待上级调用 0</strong>、<strong>等待ACK或NAK 0</strong>、<strong>等待上级调用 1</strong>、<strong>等待ACK或NAK 1</strong>。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-sender.png" alt="rdt2.1 sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-sender.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-sender.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-sender.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.1 sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h5 id="接收方-2" class="heading-element"><span>接收方</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9-2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 接收方有2种状态——<strong>等待下级调用 0</strong>、<strong>等待下级调用 1</strong>。只有在数据包ACK且<strong>收到的packet序号与目前状态等待的序号相同</strong>时，才能向上传输。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-receiver.png" alt="rdt2.1 receiver.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-receiver.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-receiver.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-1-receiver.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.1 receiver.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>为什么接收方等待1状态接收到0的packet时，为什么要反馈ACK？</p>
<p> 为了让发送方的状态转移，从“等待ACK或NAK 0”到“等待上级调用 1”。</p>
<h3 id="rdt22不发送nak的协议" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.2：不发送NAK的协议</span>
 <a href="#rdt22%e4%b8%8d%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81nak%e7%9a%84%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 用重复的ACK替代NAK，解决信号冗余问题。</p>
<h4 id="rdt22概述" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.2概述</span>
 <a href="#rdt22%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>只用ACK，不用NAK，实现和rdt2.1一样的功能。</li>
<li>在检测到错误时，不发送NAK，但是接收方要发送判断上一次序号的ACK（同时包括序号）</li>
<li>用重复的ACK代替NAK</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="rdt22有限状态机" class="heading-element"><span>rdt2.2有限状态机</span>
 <a href="#rdt22%e6%9c%89%e9%99%90%e7%8a%b6%e6%80%81%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="发送方-3" class="heading-element"><span>发送方</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9-3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 将rdt2.1中的<code>isNAK(rcvpkt)</code>判断本次反馈是NAK，替代成判断上次序号的反馈是ACK，比如rdt2.2在“<strong>等待ACK 0</strong>”时，如果<code>isACK(rcvpkt, 1)</code>，则相当于收到来rdt2.1中的<code>isNAK(rcvpkt)</code>。其余不变。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-sender.png" alt="rdt2.2 sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-sender.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-sender.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-sender.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.2 sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h5 id="接收方-3" class="heading-element"><span>接收方</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9-3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p> 接收方如果校验和检测出错，则发送上一次序号的ACK；在校验和检测正确时，发送ACK也需要带上本次的序号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-receiver.png" alt="rdt2.2 receiver.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-receiver.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-receiver.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_rdt2-2-receiver.png?size=large 2x" data-title="rdt2.2 receiver.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="rdt30信道存在错误和丢包" class="heading-element"><span>rdt3.0：信道存在错误和丢包</span>
 <a href="#rdt30%e4%bf%a1%e9%81%93%e5%ad%98%e5%9c%a8%e9%94%99%e8%af%af%e5%92%8c%e4%b8%a2%e5%8c%85" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="rdt30概述" class="heading-element"><span>rdt3.0概述</span>
 <a href="#rdt30%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 发送端在一个合理的时间内，等待接收ACK。</p>
<ul>
<li>当在等待时间内没有接收ACK时，重传</li>
<li>超过时间可能有两种情况：丢包或时延，如果发生时延可能会重复发生pkt，此时rdt2.1和2.2中的序号可以解决问题，同样的发生ACK得带上序号。</li>
<li>需要计时器</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="rdt30有限状态机" class="heading-element"><span>rdt3.0有限状态机</span>
 <a href="#rdt30%e6%9c%89%e9%99%90%e7%8a%b6%e6%80%81%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 发送方传输开始时，<code>start_timer</code>启动计时器。如果<code>timeout</code>传输超时，则重新启动计时器；如果在规定时间内接收到反馈，则<code>stop_timer</code>结束计时。</p>

<h4 id="rdt30性能" class="heading-element"><span>rdt3.0性能</span>
 <a href="#rdt30%e6%80%a7%e8%83%bd" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> rdt3.0性能很差</p>
<p>例题：一个 1Gbps的链路，15ms的传播时延，传输8000bit的packet，求发送方的使用效率。</p>
<p>传输时延</p>
<p>Dtran=LR=8000 bits109 bits/sec=8msDtran=LR=8000 bits109 bits/sec=8ms</p>
<p>发送方使用效率</p>
<p>Usender=L/RRTT+L/R=0.00830.008=0.00027Usender=L/RRTT+L/R=0.00830.008=0.00027</p>
<p> 可见rdt3.0的使用效率很低。</p>
<p> rdt3.0网络协议限制了物理资源的使用率。</p>
<h2 id="流水线协议" class="heading-element"><span>流水线协议</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b5%81%e6%b0%b4%e7%ba%bf%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 采用流水线的机制，不要等一个RTT发送回来再发下一个（即不再采用停等机制），来提高物理资源的使用率。</p>
<p>图 停等机制（Stop-and-wait）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Stop-and-Wait-Operation.png" alt="Stop-and-Wait Operation.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Stop-and-Wait-Operation.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Stop-and-Wait-Operation.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Stop-and-Wait-Operation.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Stop-and-Wait Operation.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>图 流水线机制（Pipelined Operation）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Pipelined-Operation.png" alt="Pipelined Operation.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Pipelined-Operation.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Pipelined-Operation.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Pipelined-Operation.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Pipelined Operation.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="回退n步go-back-ngbn" class="heading-element"><span>回退N步（Go-back-N，GBN）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9b%9e%e9%80%80n%e6%ad%a5go-back-ngbn" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>发送方可以有至多N个没有ACK的packet同时在流水线上</li>
<li>接收方只发送累计ACK</li>
<li>发送方给最早还没ACK的packet一个计时器，当这个计时器到时时，重传所有的未ACK的packet。</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="gbn发送方" class="heading-element"><span>GBN发送方</span>
 <a href="#gbn%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>packet头部有k bit的序号，则可以表示 2k2k 个序号。</li>
<li>“窗口”大小为N，这一段是允许的未ACK的packet</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender.png" alt="GBN sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender.png?size=large 2x" data-title="GBN sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>ACK(n)累计确认：ACK在发送的时候要带上序号#n，即#n及之前的packet都收到了。接收方发送ACK n，则证明#n及之前的packet都收到了。否则接收方还是发送之前的ACK（重复）。</li>
<li>计时器只给最早的未ACK的packet保留</li>
<li>如果timeout（n），重传#n以及比#n更大的未ACK的packet</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender%281%29.png" alt="GBN sender.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender%281%29.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender%281%29.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-sender%281%29.png?size=large 2x" data-title="GBN sender.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="gbn接收方" class="heading-element"><span>GBN接收方</span>
 <a href="#gbn%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>发送的ACK是顺序接收到的packet里面最大的序列号#
<ul>
<li>可能会产生重复的ACK</li>
<li>只需要记住期望的序列号（expextedseqnum）</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>乱序到达的packet
<ul>
<li>直接丢弃，不缓存（缓存会造成数据重复）</li>
<li>重新发送顺序最大序列号#</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-receiver.png" alt="GBN receiver.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-receiver.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-receiver.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-receiver.png?size=large 2x" data-title="GBN receiver.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="gbn流程" class="heading-element"><span>GBN流程</span>
 <a href="#gbn%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-action.png" alt="GBN action.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-action.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-action.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_GBN-action.png?size=large 2x" data-title="GBN action.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>例题：采用GBN协议，一个发送方发送了 #0到#5 的packet，但是只收到了 ACK0 和 ACK2。问发送方要重发哪些packet？</p>
<p> 重发#3、#4、#5 的 packet。</p>
<p> 虽然没有收到ACK1，但是接收方只有在#n及之前的packet都收到了的时候，才会发送ACKn，发送方接收到ACK n，则证明接收方#n及之前的packet都收到了。所以ACK1应该是在发送过程中丢包了，但是实际接收方已经收到了#1 packet。所以重发#3、#4、#5 的 packet。</p>
<h3 id="选择重传selective-repeatsr" class="heading-element"><span>选择重传（Selective Repeat，SR）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%80%89%e6%8b%a9%e9%87%8d%e4%bc%a0selective-repeatsr" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>接收方分别确认所有正确收到的pkt
<ul>
<li>缓存pkt，最终有序传给上层</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>发送方重发没ACK的pkt
<ul>
<li>发送方给每个还没ACK的packet都维持一个计时器</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>发送方的window
<ul>
<li>N个连续的序号</li>
<li>限制发送并且未ACK的pkt</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_SR-windows.png" alt="SR windows.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_SR-windows.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_SR-windows.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_SR-windows.png?size=large 2x" data-title="SR windows.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="sr发送方" class="heading-element"><span>SR发送方</span>
 <a href="#sr%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p>收到上层数据</p>
<ul>
<li>如果window里还有可用序列，则继续发送</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>timeout(n)</p>
<ul>
<li>重发<code>pkt n</code>，重启timer</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>如果</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">ACK(n)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在可接收范围内</p>
<p>[sendbase,sendbase+N−1][sendbase,sendbase+N−1]</p>
<ul>
<li>将<code>pkt n</code>标记为接收完成</li>
<li>如果 n 是最小的未ACK的pkt，则将window滑动到下一个未ACK的pkt</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="sr接收方" class="heading-element"><span>SR接收方</span>
 <a href="#sr%e6%8e%a5%e6%94%b6%e6%96%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p>如果</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">pkt n</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在接收范围内</p>
<p>[rcvbase,rcvbase+N−1][rcvbase,rcvbase+N−1]</p>
<ul>
<li>发送<code>ACK(n)</code></li>
<li>如果不是按序到达，则缓存pkt</li>
<li>如果是按序到达，则向上交付已有的按序的缓存，并将window滑动到下一个未收到的pkt</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>如果</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">pkt n</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在</p>
<p>[rcvbase−N,rcvbase−1][rcvbase−N,rcvbase−1]</p>
<p>内</p>
<ul>
<li>发送<code>ACK(n)</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>其他情况忽略</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="sr流程" class="heading-element"><span>SR流程</span>
 <a href="#sr%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">

</h4><p> 比如下面序列号有：#0, #1, #2, #3，window大小为3的情况。SR会无法分清a、b两种情况，导致在b中误判重发的第一轮的<code>pkt0</code>，被当作后一轮的<code>pkt0</code>填入。</p>
